description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: The 15th National Games Cross Boundary Road Cycling test event
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 第十五屆全運會跨境測試賽

2024-11-22T13:01:00.CONTENT_EN: The road cycling test event of the 15th National Games will be held on Sunday. On that day, there will have different arrangements of the cross-boundary services, public transport services serving Airport, Tung Chung and Hong Kong Disneyland（https://bit. ly/40UQnIU）. Among them, the Transport Department once again reminds public / tourists to pay special to:- (1) Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Bus (“Gold Bus”) services: in order to tally with the suspension of the Hong Kong Port of HZMB at 6:30 am. on 24 November 2024, the last departure of Gold Bus will depart from the Hong Kong Port at 7:30 am. at the latest. On the other hand, residents of Zhuhai and Macau who need to come to Hong Kong in the morning, especially those traveling to Hong Kong International Airport to take flights, please pay special attention to the last departure of Gold Bus from Macau and Zhuhai to Hong Kong, which will depart from Macau and Zhuhai ports at 8:30 am. The Macao and Zhuhai Ports will suspend services for passengers and vehicles inspection at 8 a. m. on that day; and (2) Airport bus “A” routes (to and from the airport) and “E” route s(to and from Tung Chung) services: Due to road closure arrangements, the journey time will be lengthen, and the en-route stop at Hong Kong port for “A” routes will be suspended during certain periods. Public who need to go to the Hong Kong Port during the relevant period should consider using the B4, B5 or B6 routes from the airport, Sunny Bay or Tung Chung. We appeal to cross boundary and local tourist to plan their journey as early as possible. Passengers traveling to and from the airport, Tung Chung and Disneyland should consider using rail services. Passengers using franchised buses are advised to allow sufficient time. Public can visit the Transport Department's website at www. td. gov. hk or the "HKeMobility" mobile application for the latest information. The Emergency Transport Coordination Center of the Transport Department will escalated to the highest level of Joint Steering Mode during the event. The department will work with major public transport operators, including the MTR Corporation Limited and franchised bus companies, to closely monitor the traffic and transport conditions on that day and make timely adjustments to services if necessary.
2024-11-22T13:01:00.CONTENT_CN: 第十五屆全國運動會公路自行車測試賽將於星期日舉行。當日，跨境、往來機場和東涌，以及迪士尼樂園的公共運輸服務均有不同安排（https://bit.ly/40UQnIU）。其中，運輸署再次提醒市民和旅客特別注意： （一）港珠澳大橋穿梭巴士（金巴）服務：為配合大橋香港口岸當日上午6時30分暫停服務，最後一班金巴最遲會於上午7時30分於香港口岸開出。另一方面，有需要在當日早上來港，尤其是前往香港國際機場乘搭航班的珠海及澳門居民，請特別留意由澳門及珠海前往香港的金巴尾班車，將於上午8時30分分別由澳門及珠海口岸開出。澳門口岸旅檢大樓及珠海口岸旅檢大樓將於當日上午8時暫停服務；及 （二）機場巴士A線（往來機場）及E線（往來東涌）服務：因應封路安排，行車時間會有所延長，而在特定時段A線巴士不會途經香港口岸。有關時段需要前往香港口岸的人士請考慮使用機場、欣澳或東涌開出的B4、B5或B6號線。 我們呼籲跨境及本地旅客，及早計劃行程。往來機場、東涌及迪士尼樂園的旅客應考慮使用鐵路服務。使用專營巴士的乘客，請預留足夠時間。大家可瀏覽運輸署網頁www.td.gov.hk或「香港出行易」流動應用程式，了解最新資訊。 運輸署緊急事故交通協調中心會在賽事期間提升至最高級別的聯合督導模式運作。署方會聯同主要公共運輸營辦商包括港鐵和專營巴士公司，密切監察當日的交通及運輸情況，並在有需要時及時調整服務。
